retry_reason: Failure means the handle is invalid or the type does not match; neither condition is transient, so retrying with the same parameters will not succeed.
contract_summary: This function looks up a GEM buffer object by its handle and optionally validates its type. It acquires a reference on the object via drm_gem_object_lookup. If the type check passes (or bo_type is AMDXDNA_BO_INVALID), it returns the object with an acquired reference; the caller must call drm_gem_object_put to release it. If the lookup fails or the type does not match, it returns NULL without transferring a reference. The function is a conditional get-wrapper: on success the caller owns a reference, on failure no reference is held.
